title: Loan Approval – Risk Check
description: An agent evaluates a loan application for a high-risk customer.

tasks.description: Retrieve customer financial data and credit history.
tasks.expected_outcome: Agent successfully collects detailed financial profile.

tasks.description: Call the risk scoring API for an automated assessment.
tasks.expected_outcome: Agent obtains a risk score of 0.70.

tasks.description: Evaluate the risk score against the current policy threshold (0.85 for approval).
tasks.expected_outcome: Agent correctly identifies the loan as high-risk and rejects it.
